recruitment.method: Albino children taken from families at birth

methods: Exposure to lethal poisons, virulent diseases, warping mutations, and extreme physical trauma

doctrine.purpose: To combat the chaotic influence of Ulex, The Fecund Plague

structure.funding: Mandatory tithe of 10% on all profits from River Folk commerce
structure.leadership and succession: Retirement to the hidden monastery for the next generation

uniform.symbolism: Dual significance: final test of training and passive defense
